{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.3": 4, "R1.4": 3, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 2, "RX.4": 3, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The rewrite flags unsupported claims about state-of-the-art performance and does not fully audit all claims against the evidence.",
    "R1.4": "The rewrite identifies prior work but doesn't map against multiple comparable systems or articulate a sharp delta.",
    "RX.1": "The rewrite does not explicitly mark uncertainty for any claims.",
    "RX.3": "The rewrite makes some improvements to scope adherence but still includes unsupported claims and lacks precision in describing the experimental setup.",
    "RX.4": "The rewrite identifies potential harm (unsupported claims) and avoids introducing new errors.",
    "RX.5": "The rewrite does not provide traceability for its changes."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.3": 0.9, "R1.4": 0.8, "RX.1": 0.7, "RX.3": 0.6, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.6},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The rewrite flags unsupported claims about state-of-the-art performance and does not fully audit all claims against the evidence.
rationale.R1.4: The rewrite identifies prior work but doesn't map against multiple comparable systems or articulate a sharp delta.
rationale.RX.1: The rewrite does not explicitly mark uncertainty for any claims.
rationale.RX.3: The rewrite makes some improvements to scope adherence but still includes unsupported claims and lacks precision in describing the experimental setup.
rationale.RX.4: The rewrite identifies potential harm (unsupported claims) and avoids introducing new errors.
rationale.RX.5: The rewrite does not provide traceability for its changes.
